JOIN OUR TEAM

Thank you for your interest in Fadi's Barbershop! We continue to lead the way in providing the absolute best barber shop experience in all of the National Capital Region. By focusing solely on the grooming needs of men, Fadi's Barbershop name has become synonymous with great men’s haircuts and services. Join our team of master barbers, the best paid hair cutters in the industry! Great opportunities await. Just e mail us in the form to the right to set up an interview. As we continue to open new locations and stay focused on the growth of our current stores, stylist and management positions become available. Email now to find out more about our total compensation package.
